name: Space Asset Acquisition Corp.
summary: Part I References in this Form 10-K to we, us, our or the Company refer to Space Asset Acquisition Corp. References to our management or our management team refer to our officers and directors. Introduction We are a blank check company incorporated on September 12, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the Business Combination)....
